steps.name: Add product to cart by name: Sauce Labs Backpack
$(".inventory_item_name.findBy(text "Sauce Labs Backpack")/By.xpath: ancestor::*[contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), ' inventory_item ')][1]/[data-test^='add-to-cart']") click()
